content: Costa->Carnival rebrand livery preservation (2024-25): Carnival Venezia and Carnival Firenze keep the Costa yellow C funnel + 'Carnival Fun Italian Style' hull text as an Italian tribute. Costa-branded photos of these ships (yellow C, Costa Cruises text) do NOT apply to the post-rebrand pages — different livery. But the Costa-derived yellow C funnel IS preserved so photos with yellow C funnel + Carnival Adventure/Fun Italian Style text = post-rebrand.
